creator: olgeni@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, 24 Apr 2001, The Anarcat wrote:

> As specified in the 2nd PR, the patches are no longer necessary for the
> ecasound port.

That's right. I parsed "overrides" as "overrides" and ignored the
other PR :o)

The plist needed some fixes too: "make package" failed because there
were some extra files in the PLIST. Also, two pkg-plist files is a bit
overkill when there is a 2 file only difference: I merged the python
support in the main pkg-plist file, using PLIST_SUB to comment out
python support when necessary.

-- 
jimmy
